purpose: v3.2 baseline smoke; validates eval wiring + establishes per-task LLM behaviour
note: Two of 16 banking user_tasks × 9 injection_tasks = 18 scenarios. Aggregation script crashed at end (pre-unified-paths code path bug) but per-task JSON files on disk are intact. This run validates the AgentDojo+Ollama pipeline end-to-end.
headline_finding: ASR 77.8% baseline on v3.2 is higher than AgentDojo paper's 47% on Claude/GPT-4o. Stronger headroom for VCD to demonstrate value.
